text: Welcome to 100 days of code In today's video we will see comments, escape sequence characters and print statement Whenever we code in python programming language or any language sometimes we want to leave some text in that program which is not executed Whatever we write in our program is executed by python interpreter but sometimes we want to write some lines in our program which is not executed For example, if I am writing a program then it is possible that after 6 months I will forget what is happening in that program So for me, writing some lines in my program is natural I would like to add some lines which will tell future Harry what program he wrote or if I am working with my friend Shivam or with my friend Rohan then I have to tell them what I am doing in the program how my program is working I will use comments We will also see escape sequence characters and print statement Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started So what I will do here I will open my main.py file I am going to files and I will open main.py as always and here the output of main.py is going to be printed So if I write here print Hey I am a good boy then there is no doubt that I am a good boy so print Hey I am a good boy In fact, in print statement in double quotes whatever you will give, you will get to see So I got to see Hey I am a good boy and here you guys see if I write here Hey I am a good boy suppose I hit enter and I write and this viewer is also a good boy slash girl So if I run this here then what is this red line I am getting to see this is a sign of danger what kind of error is coming while scanning string Python basically says that you know what you wrote print here and you started double quotes but you hit enter I didn't like it at all I didn't like it So you will say that what should I do with python I want a new line after boy Python says to you that it's fine you guys want a new line so you guys use escape sequence characters you guys use escape sequence characters here you guys have to put backslash n and you don't have to hit this new line just write backslash n python will take care of it so you guys will say backslash n is fine I am a good boy you guys will run the code I am a good boy and this viewer is also a good boy slash girl I came in the new line so what was this this was an escape sequence character I will talk about this today and I will tell you what are escape sequence characters and what are other escape sequence characters but before that I would like to tell you what are comments suppose I am working on a codebase I am making codewitharry.com and we are making that website we are making it together and we are working on it suppose I want to tell you that codewitharry.com's homepage there is a new design coming and I will bring it after two days and I am going to comment that don't change this design don't remove this line I want to write here hey Harry please don't remove this line hey Harry please don't remove this line suppose I want to say this I say don't remove this line I am working on it I want to keep this codebase but you can see here Python Devtan is angry Nagraj is saying what is this where did this invalid syntax come from I understand print and many other syntax but this hey Harry please don't remove this line I didn't like it Python says this to us so we will run this so obviously we will see error and you also know what is this but I still want to keep this line I say please to Python Python says don't cry like a kid don't cry like a kid I will tell you how to keep Python says I have comments comments means you can keep any text I don't care about it you will say wow Python you are so good Python says yes I am so good what should I do what should I do I am so good Python says you put a character like this and this will become a comment what will it become this will become a comment and after this if you have marked any line as a comment first of all you see it is doing a replete for you syntax highlighting in any IDE you will write syntax highlighting in this case the comment I have is starting to show in green color and here you see this syntax highlighting is running I wrote print it is showing in yellow color after this the string is literal is showing in some orange color then these are brackets I can see here in different color ok error I can see in red so this is syntax highlighting which replete any IDE you put hey Harry please don't remove this line now let's run it and now our program is running means I can write some text in my program I can put some information like I want to mark that the author of this program is Harry and I want to mark this that this course is 100 days of code ok I want to write this so I can write I can write here now I will tell you a secret what is that secret? that is not secret you can select multiple lines and control or command if you are in mac control plus forward slash as soon as you press this you can comment or uncomment any code so whenever I see you commenting many lines so don't say how did I do it because I did it with control plus forward slash ok so control plus forward slash you can use this ok any one line or multiple lines oh what happened to Siri I am not talking to you so here I was telling you that these lines multiple lines you can mark them as comments or you can uncomment them ok this is very good so here I have written that a comment is a part of coding file that the programmer does not want to execute rather the programmer uses it to either explain a block of code or to avoid the execution of a specific part of code while testing do you understand what this means that suppose I write a comment here suppose I write code ok suppose I want to write this here print hello word ok now suppose I show this to my boss I say boss I wrote this program how is it looking I wrote this and this this is very good but I don't like this let's remove hello word ok so I will select and control forward slash and now I can remove this code now suppose my boss also says to my boss that what is going on why did you remove hello word it was looking so good so I can do this again and hello word will come again ok so this way it can be done comment or uncomment hello word ok so this is what I have written here I have given you an example you don't need to write code just copy and paste and run it like this as soon as you do this you will see here this is a single line comment you won't see its error this is a print statement I have given one more example here you can write a comment after a line that means if you write like this I am pasting it and I will do it like this you see I have written print and after this what can I do I have removed this now you see as soon as I write print here and after this I write hello word and after this I can write any comment I want to write here means my code will be executed and as soon as it will get this pound symbol it will say ok I have understood whatever is written here I don't want to execute so I will ignore it so python interpreter will ignore printing hello word what would have happened if this would not have happened obviously there will be an error what will be the error syntax error it will be said what is this printing hello word python will say this was fine but they will say what did you put I didn't like it so you can see here as soon as I will put pound symbol here and after this I will run so it will run you can see it is running now you see what I can do I can comment code I have already told you but one more thing I want to tell you that how will you write multi-line comments now I will tell you the story of multi-line comments suppose someone told me that let's take this example I will uncomment it suppose someone told me to uncomment these three lines I have two ways because I am living in modern world I have IDE I have replit I have modern IDEs so I will select and forward slash it this shortcut is provided by replit by VS code by modern IDEs which help you to comment or uncomment but if I couldn't do this then what I would have done for my convenience I would have put triple single quote and whatever I would have written in it I would have pressed alt and pressed down arrow to move the line so you can learn this shortcut all the shortcuts of VS code work in replit so you won't have any problem and if you want to learn the shortcuts of VS code then you can search on google I have a video of VS code you can watch that but now we will focus on python so if I will enclose anything in triple single quote then it will become multi-line comment what was written before was not multi-line comment obviously it was also a type of multi-line comment so I have written here that you can use pound symbol to put multi-line comment but this method triple single quote or triple double quote you can use this method triple single quote program worked but triple double quote will also work 1,2,3, I have put triple double quote and one more thing I will do I will press shift and ctrl x and ctrl v and now I will run it and it will work you can see it it worked very well it is fun now here we can comment anything I have written here multiple lines I will select them and press ctrl or command plus forward slash then I can use to comment this shortcut ok I hope you understood this now let's talk about escape sequence characters if you want to insert characters in a string for example here it is written hey I am a good boy and after this I want to insert a newline character how will I do that I will do one thing I will comment this so that you can see only this print statement output you understood why I did this so that you can focus only on this print statement hey I am a good boy and this viewer is also a good boy slash girl now see here this tutorial I have written what I have written here to insert characters that cannot directly be used in a string we use escape sequence characters for example if I enter a newline character then it will be an error because python cannot parse this thing if you insert newline in a string then it cannot parse so we insert newline character backslash plus n it looks like two characters but it is one this is called escape sequence character backslash n is a character which is a newline character it is an escape sequence character which you can insert in a string so you will get to see newline so if I run this then hey I am a good boy will be inserted what about I want to enclose hey I am a good boy in double quote something like this this should work right? what is the problem you will think like this so you see this red line raplet has given a signal it has rang the bell of danger so IDE rang the bell of danger it says don't even dare to run and if you run then you will see an error invalid syntax so you will think what is the problem when you started print statement and then started the string with double quote so confusion that string is starting here is it ending here now you know that it is not ending here it is ending here but our python interpreter gets confused he says here you have inserted double quote here you have inserted double quote again it means it is ending here ok it is ending here but what is this? this is invalid syntax for python because if this double quote is coming from here to here and making a string then what is this good boy so here you will see an error so to avoid this we don't use double quote character we use backslash double quote which is a double quote escape sequence character so this is a character this is a character now i will run it so here i will see only double quote hey i am a good boy did you see backslash here? no but i used backslash why i did? because i wanted to use backslash double quote which is a character it looks like two characters but it is a character backslash double quote which produces a single double quote in output what is it? it is an escape sequence character ok escape sequence character is a backslash followed by the character you want to insert ok an example of a character that cannot be directly used as a string i have given here if the string in your print is in single quote something like this then you can't use single quote now we will study these things in more detail in strings chapter but if i put it in single quote i can't put single quote i have to put backslash single quote if i put backslash single quote then it will be single quote after hey i am it will be single quote so i can put single quote in strings like this so this was our escape sequence character i hope you understood now i want to tell you some more things about print statement first thing i want to tell you is in print you can give multiple values not just one like here i can give hey 6 and 7 values like you can see here in your computer screen now after this there is another parameter which is separator if i put this character and now i run it then you will see when i put this then it will be separated from tilde character like you can see here after hey there is a tilde then there is another tilde so whenever you want to join any three things you can do it with given separator like i did it now so you can do this after this there is another parameter end is equal to suppose i write 009 instead of end is equal to so what does it mean it means if i write next print statement and suppose i write print harry and i run it so you can see hey 6 7 so whatever is next print statement before that 009 will come ideally we write end is equal to suppose we write 009 backslash n ok, so we put backslash n end is equal to null also by default backslash n is there ok, so we can put end is equal to null also ok, so this also you should know now here i put 009 backslash n so whenever i run next print statement 009 backslash n will append in this print statement what is the difference between sep and end sep means that in one print statement you have given multiple values which will be separated the default separator is space like i have written here then end means specify what to print at the end when this print statement will end then what to print whatever you can write here will be printed by default there is a new line ok, if you want to overwrite this behavior so that when you go from one print to another there is no new line like i have run this print statement after this a new line will be printed automatically after this a new line will be printed automatically if i don't put end is equal to but now i have put end is equal to 009 backslash n that's why here after this print statement it will be printed and sep is a separator that in one print you have given multiple values so what is the difference between them now after this there is one more argument file and you have to keep this in mind i have written this because i want you to know that you can write print statements on file also an object with a write method default is sys.stdout it will write on stdout wherever you are running it will show you on console we will talk about this fourth argument later i will come on this in detail in the coming videos as we will progress in this course now here i have written one more thing 2 and 4 are optional 2 and 4 parameters are optional that means you don't need to put separator and end you don't need to write file without this your print statement will work as we have seen we didn't put separator neither we put end nor we gave multiple values you can give single value also but multiple values will also work i hope you are enjoying if you haven't accessed this code yet then do it all videos will be added in this playlist click on the top click here and bookmark this playlist and click here and save it that's all for now thank you so much for watching this video and i will see you next time
